prompt: A hyper-realistic, high-angle square-format photograph of a colossal topographical architectural model carved from dark basalt. The surface represents a complex loss landscape with many ridges and one deep central basin. A precise series of small, white, rectangular stone blocks are placed one by one in a spiraling path, representing iterative steps. The blocks get closer together as the slope increases. A miniature architect figure stands mid-slope, holding a laser surveying tool pointed exactly at the next calculated position. No text, no diagrams, purely physical scene. High-contrast twilight lighting, 8k resolution, --ar 1:1
metaphor: An architectural model uses discrete stone blocks as 'steps' and surveying tools to show the calculated, iterative movement down a physical slope toward a global minimum.
